---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to behavior, prompt design, or supported scopes
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
<!-- The motivating use case. Not "I want X" but "I'm trying to do Y and X would help because Z". -->

**Proposed change**
<!-- A specific concrete thing. CLI flag? New mode? New scope kind? Different prompt template? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Other ways to solve this you thought about and rejected. Helps avoid the bikeshed. -->

**Out-of-scope reminders**
<!-- See README and refactor spec §3 for what's deliberately out of scope (multi-provider beyond
     codex+Claude, debate/multi-round mode, config.yaml backends, etc.). If your request is in
     one of those categories, say why now is the right time. -->
